subTitle: Anasuya, the daughter of a rich and strict businesswoman, and Anand, a former chef from a middle-class family, fall in love. However, their background and family feud threatens their romance.

subTitle: A man searches for a bride that would be accepted by his mother and aunts. Things take a turn when he falls for a beautiful woman.

subTitle: Vicky runs away from home after having a disagreement with his brother Rajaram and goes on to become a known gangster. Years later when he returns, the two polar opposite brothers reunite.
